monday.specialTask: Water plants. Delime Dishwasher (if Wepel is around, ask if he wants to do an acid or brew master soak). Take out bottom metal racks and clean. Polish stainless steel (Dishwasher, tapwall, sink, etc.) with stainless steel cleaner.
opening: Check whiteboard in the office for any updates & initial
Turn on CO2 in walk-in
Take trash out from previous night (trash near back door)
Open behind the bar- set up taps, POS, turn on ice machine, dishwasher, to-go fridge and change icee machine from "chill" to "Ice" on both sides
Get the drawer cash out of the safe, make change if needed.
If 55°F or above unlock and set up patio (if too windy leave umbrellas inside)
Pour through all the taps
Sweep floor (including all 4 bathrooms)
Check all four bathrooms, stock. Put extra toilet paper roll on top of the dispenser, make sure there is soap and paper towels, and backups
Straighten chairs, wipe tables, straighten up merch shelf
Bring towels out from the back, fold and stock.
Windex the front and side doors, the windows, and the garage door.
Cut citrus and put out salt.

Restock the to-go fridge. Check the dates of 4 and 6-packs, and stock the newest beers behind oldest ones. Check red shelves in walk-in first for cases before pulling from pallets. Stock wines and snacks as well.
If it is slow, please sticker crowler cans, or detail the tables and chairs. Also, ask Shaun or Wepel if there are boxes needed to be glued or flats to be folded
beforeClockout: Clean and restock all 4 bathrooms
Feel all kegs and set up back up if low, restock to-go fridge
Make sure all dishes are washed and put away
Straighten tables and chairs, wipe down tables
Refresh citrus and salt if needed
Spot sweep the floor (if not busy)
Confirm you are good to leave with closer
monday.specialClosingTask: Mop and deep clean all 4 bathrooms, run 1st and 2nd column of glasses through washers
closing: Spot sweep floors, straighten chairs and wipe tables

Wipe down bar top- the whole white top including around and under the crowler machine and along the thin bar against the tap wall. Clean all four bathrooms- wipe everything down, clean toilets empty trash
Clean behind the bar, wipe everything, drain everything

Sweep and mop behind the bar (move floor mats near the fridge to give you room). Make sure you sweep and mop all the way to the edges. Get everything up off of the floor that can come up. The mats can stay to the side overnight.
Pour water over all taps and sanitize the tap wall. Remove, clean and sanitize grates leave in sink to dry. Put tap plugs in and put drainage mats through the wash
Declutter and wipe down four sinks. Clean citrus/salt setup- throw away unused salt, store citrus in fridge for next day and wash all the dishes
Clean crowler machine
Put all dirty towels in janitorial closet basket
Turn off ice machine. Bag up leftover ice and put in the freezer. Dump water bucket.
Turn off CO2 in walkin
Turn off dishwasher (and empty). Gather all trash and leave in trash can near back door
Put extra tablets and readers on chargers. Turn off TV
Slush Machine: Press the snowflake on the front of the machine til it reads chill. Empty and clean drip tray. Wipe down handle and spouts
Lock up outside tables and check outside for trash or glassware
Make sure all doors are locked- door to trash, side door, garage doors, front door
closingMoney: Make sure all tabs are closed!
Run venue closeout under staff tab
Circle cash summary, count that amount from the drawer
Count down drawer, total should be $250
Tally up cash tips
Add up all hours worked for all employees
Add up all cash tips
Divide tips by hours
Multiply that number by hours worked for each employee
Write everyone's tips on the back of the deposit slip
Put everyone's tips in their envelope and write date, amount, and initials
Put deposit and location close out in the deposit bag in the safe - Turn off dishwasher, TVs, and lights. Lock the door and set the alarm!
